ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool */,
  "pool_type" TEXT /* Type of the pool (e.g., Neighborhood, Regional) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the pool */,
  "pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the pool */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website for more information about the pool */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the pool */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location details including latitude and address */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date when the pool opened */,
  "is_indoor" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the pool is indoor or outdoor */,
  "depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the pool in meters */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Average water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last safety inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled safety inspection */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the pool can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available (e.g., locker rooms, showers, snack bar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operating hours entry */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pool's ID */,
  "weekend_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours on weekends */,
  "weekday_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours on weekdays */,
  "closure_days" TEXT /* Days the pool is closed */,
  "summer_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours during the summer season */,
  "winter_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours during the winter season */,
  "holiday_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours on holidays */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the operating hours were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_hours_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the special event */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pool's ID */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., party, competition, community event) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants for the event */,
  "fare" REAL /* Cost per participant */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when registration closes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_events_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, patron) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the visit record */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pool being visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user visiting the pool */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the visit */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the visit */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the visit (1-5) */,
  "is_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_visits_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pool's ID */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., cleaning, repair) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated pool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the pool (e.g., lifeguard, manager) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contact regarding scheduling or issues */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member terminated (if applicable) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the staff member */,
  "shifts" TEXT /* List of shifts the staff member works (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faqs" (
  "faq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the FAQ entry */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pool's ID */,
  "question" TEXT /* The question being asked */,
  "answer" TEXT /* The answer to the question */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the FAQ (e.g., operations, safety) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the FAQ was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the FAQ was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faqs_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pool's ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The feedback text submitted by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time of feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the feedback (1-5) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been addressed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time for the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "is_email" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is sent via email */,
  "is_sms" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is sent via SMS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_parking" (
  "parking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking facility */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pool's ID */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the parking lot */,
  "accessible_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of accessible spaces available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the parking facility */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parking is paid */,
  "fee_per_hour" REAL /* Fee per hour for parking */,
  "max_hours" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed hours for parking */,
  "is_reserved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parking lot is reserved for special events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pool_parking_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)
